ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces_states" (
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province or state */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or region where the province or state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province or state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province or state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city of the province or state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_states_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_states_country_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_region_id") REFERENCES countries_regions ("country_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country or region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country or region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city of the country or region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "is_capital" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the city is the capital of the province or state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the data was updated */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "source_agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health agency that provided the data */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_agency_id") REFERENCES health_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data update where the case was reported */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of the case (e.g., confirmed, recovered, death) */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was reported */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient (if available) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the case (e.g., city, hospital) */,
  "is_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient is hospitalized */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient's condition is critical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES data_updates ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health agency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the health agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the health agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the research team */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the team */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the team */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Description of the team's research focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health intervention */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health agency that implemented the intervention */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the intervention */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_interventions_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES health_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the vaccination data was collected */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate (percentage of the population vaccinated) */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was collected */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "first_dose_rate" REAL /* Rate of first dose vaccinations */,
  "second_dose_rate" REAL /* Rate of second dose vaccinations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization data entry */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the hospitalization data was collected */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate (percentage of the population hospitalized) */,
  "hospitalization_date" TEXT /* Date when the hospitalization data was collected */,
  "total_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_rate" REAL /* Rate of patients in the ICU */,
  "ventilator_rate" REAL /* Rate of patients on ventilators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data entry */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the testing data was collected */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Testing rate (percentage of the population tested) */,
  "testing_date" TEXT /* Date when the testing data was collected */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Rate of positive test results */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, antigen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health agency staff, researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
